name: featureImportance
invariants: output.ok === false || !Array.isArray(output.result.rankings) || output.result.rankings.every(r => typeof r.feature === 'string' && Number.isFinite(r.variance) && Number.isFinite(r.stdDev) && Number.isFinite(r.correlation) && Number.isFinite(r.importance))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Component sends { features: parsed.dataset, target }. Returns totalFeatures/numericFeatures/targetField/rankings[].{feature,variance,stdDev,correlation,absCorrelation,importance}/topFeatures — the EXACT fields MlActionPanel's feature card renders (feature + importance bar). <3 rows → honest {message}. FAIL-CLOSED: a non-finite cell ("Infinity"/"NaN") makes the field non-numeric (Number.isFinite gate) so it is EXCLUDED from rankings rather than poisoning variance/importance with NaN that renders as `null%` bar width (fixed 2026-06-28).
